title: (Cobblemon) RegiCraft
description:
Modpack for a Friendly Community of Pokemon and create Lovers 

Come join us in the Adventure
body:
# RegiCraft
## A modpack built around the fabric version of Cobblemon adding Create and a variation of food mods

made for builders and pokemonfans alike!!!
_________________________________________________________________________________________
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
So Join us in Creating Contraptions Crazy bases and more!!!!



![One of the projects being build on the server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12bb6ba64684e9096abb1a9173c2bd4feb4ec1e2_0.webp)
![Registeel statue at warp registeel faction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c611777643fb0a94cf5d761c7fcc8436f0ca0d2_0.webp)
